records.playName: A Love Gone Wrong,From Youth to Gray
Locked in Love：Prisoner of Love and Revenge

records.playDesc:
Zana Lowe thought Shawn Wayne was her redemption, but soon realized his love was as fleeting as a summer storm.
When she finally let go, it broke him in ways he never saw coming.
Shawn had once loved her with everything, but when he discovered she was the daughter of his enemy, he was ready to walk away.
But every wound he caused her only cut him deeper.

Zoey Lynn used to be nothing more than a background character in a novel until she woke up and married Ian Lewis in a whirlwind. At her birthday party, she turned the tables on Nora Sharp and the others who were scheming against her, breaking off her engagement with her deceitful ex with style.
Later, in a high-stakes jewelry design competition, Zoey exposed Nora Sharp's fraudulent identity and claimed the CEO position at the Lynn Group. In the end, Zoey found her happy ending with Ian.

Sawyer Sutton had been in a seven-year relationship with Yara Sharp, but at their wedding, Zayn Luther and Yara's mother ruined everything.
Once Sawyer uncovered the truth, he broke up with Yara and joined HyunCloud Tech, only to discover that he was the CEO all along.
At the Marriott Hotel, his true identity was revealed, and Zayn Luther and the others were left exposed, their true colors shining through.
In the end, Sawyer teamed up with Shirley Linden, finding happiness and starting a new chapter of his life.

It all started on the longest night of the year. Gavin never believed in fate until a woman in Goldenvale Dynasty robes literally crashed into his world. Her name was Fiona, and she wasn't just lost. She was centuries out of place.
As the two navigated city lights, ancient secrets, and the occasional culture clash, things got complicated. She had a family back in the past and a marriage she didn't want. He had a quiet life that suddenly didn't feel so quiet anymore.
Somewhere between time-travel theories and late-night heart-to-hearts, love happened. And after all the chaos, the heartbreak, and a whole lot of cosmic interference… they made it. Against all odds, they chose each other.

Vincy and Richard had been in love for three years—until pressure from her father and his powerful family forced her to walk away. She broke his heart to protect them both, but the pain never left her.
Three years later, Richard returned from Wall Street, no longer the boy she once knew but a man determined to win her back. His love burned hotter than ever, and this time, Vincy made a choice: to stop running and to stand beside him once more.

records.playName: The Billionaire's Trio: A Father's Love Pursuit
